system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi, this is Omar Davis. Look, I just had some unexpected money problems, and honestly, I can’t afford all these business class tickets anymore. I need to downgrade every single one of my flights from business to economy. I don’t want to change the flights or the passengers—just the cabin class. 

I’m fine with getting the refund back to whatever payment method I used, I just need this done as soon as possible. And after you process the refunds, I want to know how much money I actually saved in total. 

Can you help me with this? Because I’m really stressed out right now and need this sorted.

I can help you downgrade your business class reservations to economy and process the refunds for the price difference. To get started, I need your user ID and the reservation IDs for all the bookings you want to downgrade. If you don’t know your reservation IDs, I can look them up for you.

Could you please confirm your user ID and let me know if you need help locating your reservation IDs?

Yeah, my user ID is omar_davis_3817. Honestly, I don’t have the reservation IDs handy right now—can you just look them up for me? I just want every business class flight under my account switched to economy. 

Please, I really need this done quickly.

Thank you for providing your user ID. I will locate all your business class reservations and prepare to downgrade them to economy. Once I have the reservation details, I’ll list the changes for your confirmation before proceeding.

Please hold on while I retrieve your reservation information.

I am currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your reservation details. I will try again to access your reservations so I can proceed with downgrading your business class bookings to economy. Please hold on for a moment while I resolve this.

I'm currently unable to access your reservation details due to a technical issue. To ensure your request is handled as quickly as possible, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you directly.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I'm currently unable to access your reservation details due to a technical issue. To ensure your request is handled as quickly as possible, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you directly.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
